CONTENT IN THIS BOX PROVIDED BY OUR SPONSOR

 

Sponsored Content

AI Cloud Infrastructure Report: Building AI-Ready Platforms at Scale

AI adoption is accelerating, but cloud infrastructure remains a major bottleneck. EON’s report explores how organizations are rethinking data, storage, and resilience to support AI workloads, highlighting the need for modern, scalable infrastructure that turns cloud data into an accessible asset for analytics, recovery, and AI innovation. Download the report.

Design for Failure: How to Guarantee Data Access During Cloud Outages

This guide for engineering teams explains how to ensure backup data remains reachable, searchable, and restorable during major cloud outages. Download now.

Live Session w/ AWS: How shift left broke backup governance

Distributed backup ownership sounds efficient until it breaks at scale. Discover the warning signs and what to do about it. Watch live.

Multi-Cloud Backup Is Broken: Architectural Patterns That Actually Work

This article outlines the operational hurdles of multi-cloud data protection, including tool fragmentation, inconsistent policies, and the complexities of cross-cloud recovery. Learn more.

How an AI Agent Deleted Production Data and Its Backups at a Company (and How to Protect Yours)

AI agents can trigger catastrophic data loss by deleting production and backups using valid credentials. This article explains why traditional backup models fail under autonomous systems and how isolated, immutable recovery layers prevent AI‑driven outages. Read here.
